invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2800（关键支撑）或融资费率Z-Score回升至-30%以上（空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2800 (key support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -30% (short pressure eases).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.122（基于ATR支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至90%以上（轧多风险加剧），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.122 (based on ATR support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 90% (long squeeze risk intensifies).
